zh.lifeSummary: Anne Harewell是Anne Middleton的女兒，於1478年出生在英國瓦維其可爾。她於1497年與James de Clifford在英國格盧斯特斯爾福藍普頓 白 希雷斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年12月5日在英國武斯特斯爾享年87歲。

nameMeanings.name: Harewell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of several places called Hartwell (Staffordshire, Northamptonshire, Buckinghamshire, Sussex, and Devon), all named with Old English heorot ‘hart, stag’ + wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Anne Harewell was born in 1478, in Warwickshire, England as the daughter of Anne Middleton. She married James de Clifford in 1497, in Frampton by Cirencester, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died on 5 December 1565, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 87.

Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 décembre 1565, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 87 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Harewellは1478年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでAnne Middletonの娘として生まれた。1497年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアフランプトン ビー シアーエンセスターでJames de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年12月5日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで87歳で死去した。

ko.Frampton , Gloucestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Harewell(은)는 1478년 영국 워윅실르에서 Anne Middleton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1497년 영국 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터에서 James de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 12월 5일 영국 워스스터실르에서 87세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anne Harewell родилась в 1478 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. Её мать звали Anne Middleton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James de Clifford в 1497 г. в местности фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 5 декабря 1565 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 87 лет.
